hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null || notify-send 'Claude Code' 'Claude Code needs your attention' 2>/dev/null || true

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$file" == *.java ]]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"[포맷 검증] Java 파일 수정됨: %s — reformat_file 후 checkstyleMain pmdMain 검증 필요"}}' "$(basename "$file")"; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit'; then if [ -f "./gradlew" ] && ./gradlew checkstyleMain pmdMain; then exit 0; elif [ ! -f "./gradlew" ]; then exit 0; else echo '정적 분석 실패 — checkstyleMain pmdMain 오류를 수정 후 다시 커밋하세요' >&2; exit 2; fi; else exit 0; fi
